global.description: The ad features a vibrant pink background with product displays and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting limited stock products with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Product display
elements.description: A set of three pink rectangular shapes resembling product packaging, arranged in a row.

elements.label: Limited stock message
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Limited stock' positioned prominently in the center.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message that reads 'Shop bestsellers now'.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small yellow circular badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text at the top right.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent white button with rounded edges that says 'Get offer' in bold text.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A bold, large text showing the price '€29.99' in white, located at the bottom left.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: The logo 'ZenDrop' in large, bold black text at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Sale indicator
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and playful, Limited stock, Get offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the sale badge, the main product display in the center, and the call to action at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Limited stock, Shop bestsellers now, €29.99, Get offer, ZenDrop, SALE
